creator: larshenrikoern@outlook.dk
text:
No. They are not related.

 I have rebuilt all packages today with synth. And gimp-app does end with the same error as above on my system. It has happened with the last "graphics/poppler: bump revision of consumers" update. Is it the line "PORTEPOCH?=	1" that is to blame. Have not seen such a line before.

Hope this is to some help
